stemHtml: What does the FMS overfly function consist of?

options.a: Manually selecting a flight plan waypoint to fly over when sequencing it instead of flying by at the transition.
options.b: Manually selecting a flight plan to fly over each of the waypoints at the transitions along the route.
options.c: Manually selecting a flight plan waypoint to hold over for a selected time.
options.d: Selecting the secondary flight plan making it active to fly over the legs.
